title: Can a team run multiple playbooks/workspaces concurrently?

posts.author: scottG (Scott)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m having trouble finding any information on this question and hope someone can point me to a correct resource or answer me. Is it possible to run multiple playbooks (runbooks) concurrently and does this have any possible lag/latency issues associated with it?

Thanks,
Scott
